title: Ninja ZEROSTICK Premium Cookware 26cm Stock Pot with Glass Lid, Long Lasting, Non-Stick, Hard Anodised Aluminium, Induction Compatible, Oven Safe to 260°C, Grey, C30426UK
features: 26CM STOCK POT: Compatible with 20.25cm induction ring. Includes oven-safe glass lid with steam vent. Perfect for soups and sauces, casserole, stew, curry, chilli and more.
ZERO STICK, CHIP OR FLAKE: Durable & long-lasting, Ninja ZEROSTICK is dishwasher safe, metal utensil safe, scratch resistant and designed to withstand high-heat cooking.
DURABLE & LONG-LASTING: Every pan is metal utensil safe, dishwasher safe, scratch resistant and oven safe up to 260°C. Built to last from hard-anodised aluminium with cast stainless steel handles.
STOPS FOOD FROM STICKING, DAY AFTER DAY: Cook using little to no oil. Sear like you can in stainless steel, without sticking. Suitable for all hob types, including induction
INCLUDES: Ninja ZEROSTICK Premium 26cm Stock Pot and Glass Lid. Dishwasher Safe. Weight 2.5kg . Colour: Grey.
10-YEAR REPLACEMENT GUARANTEE Including the ZEROSTICK coating. Upon registration with Ninja (When used as directed in the use and care guide.)
